name: blog_blogmark
schema:
CREATE TABLE "blog_blogmark" (
   "id" INTEGER,
   "created" TEXT,
   "slug" TEXT,
   "metadata" TEXT,
   "card_image" TEXT,
   "is_draft" INTEGER,
   "link_url" TEXT,
   "link_title" TEXT,
   "title" TEXT,
   "via_url" TEXT,
   "via_title" TEXT,
   "commentary" TEXT,
   "use_markdown" INTEGER,
   "series_id" INTEGER REFERENCES "blog_series"("id")
)
